If you are a fan of cargo carriers, this sale is a great opportunity to pick up the brand’s XPedition2 e-bikes with increased savings over the past few months, with the base XPedtion2 single-battery e-bike and $405 in FREE gear at $1,399 shipped, while the XPedition2 dual-battery e-bike and $744 in FREE gear is going for $1,799 shipped, and the XPedition2 dual-battery long-range e-bike at $894 in FREE gear is at $1,999 shipped. Without the discounts on the bundle items you’d be paying $1,804, $2,543, or $2,892 for these packages at full price, with these bundles being the biggest we have yet to track in 2026, previously only going as high as $694 until this event. Head below to learn all about these cargo-ready commuters, as well as browse the full lineup of offers while they last.

items.title: EcoFlow’s extended Earth Day Sale with up to 62% off power stations, bonus savings, more starting from $169
items.summary:
Update 4/27: EcoFlow has extended its Earth Day Sale event for an unknown amount of time longer, so be sure to get orders in, as it’s highly likely to end very soon.

EcoFlow has launched its Members’ Festival x Earth Day Mega Sale with up to 62% discounts, member-only deals (sign-up is free), 3x EcoCredit rewards, and plenty of free gifts. One notable members-only bundles is the DELTA 3 Ultra Plus Portable Power Station with a FREE Power Hat at $1,449 shipped, which matches in price at Amazon without getting the Power Hat. This unit on its own normally goes for $2,899 at full price, which has consistently been keeping down between $1,499 and $1,449 since 2026 began. While we’ve only seen this rate beaten by one-time falls to $1,424 during Black Friday and the $1,399 low during January’s Winter Storm Sale, making this the next-best price with $1,450 slashed from its tag – plus, you’re getting the $99 Power Hat totally free for $1,549 in total savings. Head below to learn more about it, get the rundown on all the extra savings opportunities, and browse the full sale lineup.
